title: Bigso Box of Sweden Set of 2 Decorative Paper Round Storage Boxes with Lids - Stackable Hat Box Style Storage Containers - Small Box Organisers for Bits & Bobs - Grey
features: STACKABLE DESIGN: The practical storage boxes can be stacked on top of each other to save space around the house, and one can be stored inside another to be stowed away when not in use.

DECORATIVE ORGANISATION: The accessory box's eye-catching scallop detail adds charm to any space while keeping bits and bobs hidden in plain sight, with a range of neutral colours to easily mix and match.
PRACTICAL LID: With a removable lid and eyelet for easy access, the storage basket keeps content within easy reach, yet sheltered from dust, dirt and moisture.
SUSTAINABLE CONSTRUCTION: The storage basket features a solid, recycled fibreboard core coated with paper sourced from exemplary and sustainably managed forests.
THOUGHTFULLY SIZED: The organiser box is generously sized to fit a range of different objects, yet folds flat to save space. Dimensions: Small - D23 x H15 cm, Large - D26 x H17.5 cm.
description: From the manufacturer Storage Boxes Whether in the office or at home, Bigso Box of Sweden's range of hard and soft storage boxes are made to look stylish no matter where they're placed. With durable and easy-to-care-for construction, each style of storage box, cube, and basket makes for easy organisation of clothes and belongings. Desk Organisers Try an elegant look for your office with Bigso Box of Sweden's desk organisers. Made of recycled fibreboard, each storage unit can be combined with multiple other designs and colours so you can have a sleek and practical workspace.
